    PSV Win, BTTS

    1 year ago
     +1 Reply Report Sign in or join us to rate comments! Sign In || Join Us
  • [ - ] StickandMove - member since 02-Oct-15

    Despite knocking Juve out of the UCL, PSV has started 2025 actually terrible. They were at least 5 points clear ahead of Ajax. Now they are trailing by 5! On top of that they've got knocked out of de domestic cup at home soil on Wednesday vs their weekend opponents. This time out they will play at the Eagles. Which PSV team is going to show up? The one that played vs Juve or the one that has been pretty awful since the beginning of the new year, especially in their domestic games? I think you can place a safe bet on BTTS
